agent_output_excerpt:
## Pippen's Stability, Integration & Defense Review

### The 3am Scenario

An order fails silently after payment. The on-call engineer sees the API Gateway trace ID `abc-123` in the customer complaint. They can follow it through OrderService and into Kafka. Then â€” **the trail goes cold**. FulfillmentWorker generated a new trace ID `xyz-789`. NotificationService has yet another `def-456`. AuditService has two unrelated traces from two different callers. The engineer is now grepping five services
